rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0050
rows.name: We came looking for you at Eric's request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0080
rows.name:
Coming all this way, just
for someone like me[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0110
rows.name: Do you intend to return to NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0140
rows.name:
violating service regulations
through dereliction of duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0150
rows.name:
We have the authority to
forcibly take you back with us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0170
rows.name: Because we aren't taking the flora and fauna?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0190
rows.name:
But you must realize how difficult
that would be in practical terms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0220
rows.name:
They are the ones who
nurtured this planet, Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0250
rows.name:
they are all going to
disappear from this land.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0260
rows.name:
That's why I thought, at the very
least, I should stay with them[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0270
rows.name:
I think your feelings should
come first, Ted-san[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0290
rows.name: I don't know exactly how to say it,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0300
rows.name:
but please don't forget that there are
people who care about you, Ted-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0320
rows.name:
Ultimately, your own beliefs
must come first.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0350
rows.name:
Please don't forget that if you do this,
you'll force people to leave you behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0370
rows.name:
Well, I'm sure you came here after
thinking it over yourself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0390
rows.name: I know it won't change anything, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0400
rows.name:
Would it be bad to bring their
genetic information with us, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0410
rows.name:
You mean the genetic information
of Mira's flora and fauna?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0430
rows.name:
I don't think there's any
rule against it, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0450
rows.name:
You're saying we should take the genetic
information of Mira's flora and fauna[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0460
rows.name:
the same way we did with the Earthlife
Colonization Project, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0470
rows.name: Just as expected from Elma-san, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0490
rows.name:
I'm so happy my feelings
got through to you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0500
rows.name: That's a pretty good idea, for a Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0510
rows.name:
Saying "for a Nopon" was
completely unnecessary, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0520
rows.name:
Because our time is limited, we won't
be able to get every species, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0560
rows.name:
Even if it's only a small fraction, if we can leave proof
in the next world that this planet Mira existed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0570
rows.name: I want to do whatever I can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0580
rows.name:
I'll gather what I can in Nightglow Forest, so
could I ask you to handle the other continents?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32290100_MSG0600
rows.name:
I have sent you the coordinates for the genetic
data extraction point in Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]
